Hero.heading: Gourmet finds, delivered with care
Hero.paragraph: Discover curated specialties, small-batch producers, and pantry gems on Tramelle Source Gourmet.
Hero.cinematicSub: A B2B and B2C marketplace: producer-first, authentic specialties, six languages, international support and logistics.

Cart.title: Shopping cart
Cart.minimumOrderLine: {seller}: current {current}, minimum {min} for this producer’s items.
Cart.shippingUnsplitHint: See shipping in the total below
Cart.sellerPolicyItDetail: Italy: below {freeAt} of goods in this block, delivery {flat}; from {freeAt} up, free.
Cart.sellerPolicyEuDetail: Non-Italian addresses: below {freeAt} in this block, {flat} delivery; from {freeAt} up, free.
Cart.shippingBlockFree: Free delivery for this block (threshold met).
Cart.shippingFlatItHint: Fixed-rate shipping to Italy; confirm at checkout with your address.
Cart.shippingFlatEuHint: Fixed-rate delivery outside Italy; confirm at checkout.
Cart.shippingTramellePolicyNote: Based on destination country: {country}. If no address yet, we assume Italy (IT) for the estimate.

Checkout.pageDescription: Complete your order on Tramelle — payment and shipping.
Checkout.stripePaymentAwaitElementsHint: If this lasts more than a few seconds, refresh the page to load the secure form.
Checkout.stripePaymentMissingClientSecret: Could not load the payment form: Stripe session data from the server is incomplete. Refresh the page or go back to the cart and try again.
Checkout.stripePublishableKeyMissing: Online payment is unavailable: the Stripe publishable key (NEXT_PUBLIC_STRIPE_KEY) is missing from site configuration.
Checkout.paymentSecureHint: All transactions are secure and encrypted.
Checkout.paymentManualDisabledHint: Test manual payment is disabled. Enable Stripe (Connect) on the sales channel / region in admin, then refresh checkout.
Checkout.shippingConsegnaProntaNoLista: Delivery is at €0 under Tramelle thresholds (or already applied to the cart). You can pay below.
Checkout.placeOrderHelper: Grey until details are ready; turns blue when address, delivery and card are complete.
Checkout.inlineLoginHint: Sign in here without leaving checkout — your cart is kept.
Checkout.shippingNeedsAddress: Save your shipping address above to see delivery options.
Checkout.shippingTramelleCheckoutNote: Per-producer shipping matches your cart: Italy free on blocks over €65, otherwise €6.50; non-Italian addresses free over €95, otherwise €12.50. Final charge at payment.
Checkout.shippingReadOnlyNote: Summary only: carrier choice is not available here. The default (first) option per producer is applied automatically.
Checkout.shippingOptionsLoadFailed: We couldn’t load shipping options. Refresh the page or try again in a moment.
Checkout.addressSavedAddressesPrompt: Hi {name}, do you want to use one of your saved addresses?

ProductSheet.shippingPoint1: Shipping options, delivery times and costs depend on the seller and destination; you’ll see what’s available at checkout.
ProductSheet.shippingPoint2: Returns follow applicable law (e.g. 14-day withdrawal in the EU, with exceptions for perishable or hygiene-sealed goods). Check the seller’s terms for details.
ProductSheet.reviewsCount: {count, plural, =0 {No reviews yet} one {# review} other {# reviews}}

Sellers.directoryGridEmptyTitle: No producers found for this selection.
Sellers.directoryGridEmptyHint: Try changing the filters or browse all producers.
Sellers.directoryMetaDescription: Artisan producers from around the world, handpicked for Tramelle. Discover their specialties on {site}.
Sellers.homeFeaturedSubtitle: Selected for authenticity, quality, and story.

Registration.hubMetaTitle: Sign up on Tramelle — Private, B2B buyer or Producer
Registration.hubMetaDescription: Create your Tramelle account. Shop gourmet products, access B2B prices or sell your artisan specialties.
Registration.producerMetaTitle: Sell your artisan specialties online | Tramelle Source Gourmet
Registration.producerMetaDescription: Bring your artisan products to Tramelle. Gourmet marketplace B2C and B2B, 6 languages, worldwide shipping. Apply as a producer.
Registration.producerHeroSub: Tramelle is the gourmet marketplace connecting artisan producers with consumers and buyers worldwide.
Registration.producerWhy2Text: Sell to end consumers and professional buyers.
Registration.producerWhy3Text: You set retail and wholesale prices.
Registration.producerWhy4Text: Pay on sales, aligned with the marketplace model.
Registration.producerHow1: Apply — fill in your company details
Registration.producerHow3: Onboarding — upload products and open your shop
Registration.producerHow4: Sell — manage orders, prices and catalog from your panel
Registration.producerFaq1Q: How much does it cost to sell on Tramelle?
Registration.producerFaq1A: Marketplace model: no fixed upfront fee; commercial terms are shared when you are approved.
Registration.producerFaq2A: Typically 48–72 business hours for a first response.
Registration.producerFaq3Q: Can I set different B2C and B2B prices?
Registration.producerFaq3A: Yes: separate price lists for consumers and professional buyers, within platform policies.
Registration.producerFaq4A: Logistics are defined in onboarding depending on your country and product category.
Registration.producerLinkBuyer: Are you a buyer? Discover Tramelle B2B
Registration.buyerMetaTitle: Buy gourmet products wholesale | Tramelle B2B
Registration.buyerMetaDescription: Access wholesale prices from selected artisan producers. Importers, retailers and buyers: join Tramelle B2B.
Registration.buyerHeroSub: Importers, retailers and professional buyers: access wholesale prices across the Tramelle catalog.
Registration.buyerHow3: Access — see wholesale prices set by each producer
Registration.buyerFaq1A: Usually company data, VAT and a commercial reference; more may be requested case by case.
Registration.buyerFaq2Q: Are B2B prices the same for all products?
Registration.buyerFaq2A: Each producer sets wholesale prices; they may vary by product and volume.
Registration.buyerFaq3A: Depends on producer and product (e.g. carton multiples); visible on the product page once B2B is approved.
Registration.buyerFaq4Q: Can I order from multiple producers in one checkout?
Registration.buyerFaq4A: Checkout can include multiple sellers; shipping follows each producer’s rules.
Registration.buyerLinkProducer: Are you a producer? Sell on Tramelle
Registration.formThanksBuyerBody: We will verify your profile within 24–48 hours.
Registration.errorSubmit: Submission failed. Please try again later.

CategoryPage.metaDescriptionFallback: Artisan gourmet selection, small producers and shipping across Europe. Curated catalog on {site}.
